src.osir_api.osir_api.api.OsirApiCase module

src.osir_api.osir_api.api.OsirApiCase.create_case(case_name: str)[source]
src.osir_api.osir_api.api.OsirApiCase.get_case()[source]
src.osir_api.osir_api.api.OsirApiCase.get_tasks(case_name: str)[source]
src.osir_api.osir_api.api.OsirApiCase.retrieved_case_handler(case_name: str)[source]
async src.osir_api.osir_api.api.OsirApiCase.upload_file(case_name: str, file: UploadFile = File(PydanticUndefined), name: str = Form(PydanticUndefined), chunk_number: int = Form(0), total_chunks: int = Form(1))[source]

Handles file uploads with chunked transfer (if total_chunks > 1) or single-file upload. Files are stored in the case directory.

Parameters:

  • case_name – Name of the case where files should be uploaded

  • file – File to be uploaded

  • name – Name of the file

  • chunk_number – Current chunk number

  • total_chunks – Total number of chunks

Raises:

  • HTTPException – If a validation error occurs

  • (e.g., missing data, invalid file size, case not found). –
